underlying_goal: Add a /simplify step to the ship command workflow in both beam-claude-skills and dotfiles repos, and explore adding a CI check for skill review
friction_detail: Claude added a simplify rule to CLAUDE.md that would cause duplication, and initially missed updating the dotfiles repo copy until user pointed it out.
brief_summary: User wanted to add a /simplify step to the ship command in two repos and sync them; achieved after correcting a duplication issue and a missed dotfiles update.
